reason: Evaluation exposed a ZECUSDT SHORT loss beyond one unit of plan capital in a target with only two trades. The reused monthly summary computed median/worst target drawdown only for targets with at least three trades, contradicting the frozen gate's unqualified 'worst target' wording and hiding the most important tail-risk observation.
changes: Compute median and worst target drawdown across every actually traded target.
Retain the existing per-target calculations and record the drawdown target scope explicitly.
Do not add a stop, change a signal, exclude ZECUSDT, or alter any return.
